days.title: Solo — Tiong Bahru, Sim Lim, Spectra
days.summary: Foodie morning in Tiong Bahru, hardware hunting at Sim Lim, Led Zeppelin tribute and Spectra at night.

days.title: Kopitiam morning · wife arrives LH780
days.summary: Solo morning at Albert Centre + Keong Saik, then T2 pickup at 4:30pm, easy evening near the hotel.

days.title: Fort Canning · Civic District · CÉ LA VI
days.summary: Together for the first full day — park, National Museum, Esplanade, and the MBS rooftop at 7:30pm.

days.title: Gardens by the Bay — the big one
days.summary: Toast Box + Sultan Mosque morning, then Flower Dome / Cloud Forest / Botero in the afternoon, Satay by the Bay, Garden Rhapsody.

days.title: Little India + Peranakan dinner
days.summary: Clap Cafe, Tekka, Mustafa, long siesta, then True Blue Cuisine at Armenian St.

days.title: Chinatown · bumboat · crab
days.summary: Oh Wunder brunch, temples, Maxwell, Telok Ayer walk, river cruise at sunset, Jumbo Seafood.

days.title: Katong + Jewel sendoff
days.summary: Slow Katong morning, 328 laksa, Jewel Canopy Park, flight home.

places.name: Hotel Waterloo Singapore
places.description: Your base for the week — 78 Waterloo St, Handwritten Collection. Central, walkable to Bugis, Kampong Glam, Bras Basah, Civic District.
tips: Request a late checkout for Fri 22 May.
Bag storage available after checkout.

places.name: Heap Seng Leong Coffeeshop
places.description: Old-school kopitiam from 1974 at 10 North Bridge Rd. Charcoal-toasted butter kaya toast, kopi from a sock filter. Pure 1960s Singapore.

places.name: Tiong Bahru Market & Hawker Centre
places.description: 1950s art deco estate hawker centre. Loo's Hainanese Curry Rice, chwee kueh, lor mee. Several Michelin-mentioned stalls.

places.name: Tiong Bahru Bakery
places.description: Flagship branch at 56 Eng Hoon St. Famous kouign-amann, croissants, flat white. Coffee and dessert stop after the market.

places.name: Sim Lim Square
places.description: Six floors of tech, electronics, components, and used gear. Hardware tinkerer's mecca. Cash gets better prices.
tips: Cash only at most stalls.
Upper floors are less touristy — better deals on components.

places.name: Lau Pa Sat & Satay Street
places.description: Victorian cast-iron market. Head to Boon Tat St when the satay grills fire up at 7pm — stalls 7 & 8 are the famous ones. Chicken and beef satay, sugar cane juice.
places.pregnancyNotes: Chicken and beef satay fully cooked.

places.name: Led Zeppelin Tribute — Immigrant Sonz
places.description: Free outdoor tribute concert at the DBS Foundation Outdoor Theatre (Esplanade waterfront stage). Grass seating, no booking.
tips: Bring water. Grass seating — small towel useful.

places.name: Spectra at Marina Bay
places.description: Free 9pm light and water show across Marina Bay. Walk over Helix Bridge from the Esplanade to get there.

places.name: Albert Centre breakfast
places.description: 5-minute walk from the hotel. Back-row stalls: bak kut teh (peppery pork rib soup), chwee kueh, soon kueh. Easy and local.

places.name: Keong Saik & Bukit Pasoh walk
places.description: Singapore's prettiest restored shophouses — former brothel district turned boutique hotel zone. Quiet on Sunday mornings.

places.name: Hong Lim Market & Food Centre
places.description: Off-tourist-track hawker at 531A Upper Cross St. Ji Ji Wanton Mee inside; Ya Hua Bak Kut Teh nearby. Bib Gourmand curry chicken noodle on level 2.
places.pregnancyNotes: Bak kut teh and wanton mee fully cooked.

places.name: Changi T2 — wife arrives LH780
places.description: Track LH780 via the Changi Airport app. Wait near Arrivals Hall A (Starbucks is right there). Scheduled landing 16:30; realistic exit 17:45–18:00 (deplane + immigration + bags from a 747).
tips: Tanah Merah is the interchange — take the Changi Airport branch there.
Grab home justified: jet-lagged pregnant wife + luggage + heat (~SGD 25, 30 min via ECP).

places.name: Paramore Tribute — elysrei (OPTIONAL)
places.description: "Paramore & more & more" by elysrei & friends at the DBS Foundation Outdoor Theatre. Free, grass seating, leave anytime. Decide after she lands based on her energy.
places.pregnancyNotes: Optional — only do this if she has energy after a 12-hour flight.

places.name: Albert Centre dinner
places.description: Default if she's too tired for the concert. Bak kut teh, soon kueh, tau suan dessert. Low energy, cheap, 5 min from hotel.
places.pregnancyNotes: Bak kut teh fully cooked. Skip any raw cockle sides.
tips: Use a tissue packet to reserve a seat — local custom.

places.name: Sultan Mosque by night
places.description: Beautifully lit at night. Gentle walk through Kampong Glam — murals and lanterns along Arab Street and Haji Lane.

places.name: Antler & Ember (hotel restaurant)
places.description: Hotel restaurant at 78 Waterloo St. Breakfast buffet with hot dishes, pastries, fruits. No travel needed — saves energy for the park.
places.pregnancyNotes: Ask for hard-boiled eggs if runny options are on the buffet.

places.name: Fort Canning Park
places.description: Tree Tunnel spiral staircase (the photo spot), Spice Garden, Sundial Garden, ASEAN Sculpture Park. Flat shaded paths — arrive early for a clean Tree Tunnel photo.
places.pregnancyNotes: Flat and shaded — comfortable.

places.name: National Museum of Singapore
places.description: Heavily air-conditioned. The History Gallery gives the best trip context. Adults SGD 15. 5 min downhill from Fort Canning.
places.pregnancyNotes: AC throughout, benches available.

places.name: Funan Mall lunch
places.description: AC food court at 107 North Bridge Rd. Picnic Funan food hall on level 7 has better-rated stalls.
places.pregnancyNotes: Stick to thoroughly cooked options.

places.name: Civic District stroll
places.description: St Andrew's Cathedral, the Padang, Esplanade Park along the waterfront. Flat and breezy at sunset.

places.name: Esplanade Roof Garden
places.description: Free public roof garden — lift up Esplanade Mall. Sweeping Marina Bay view, far less crowded than MBS.
tips: Plan to be here by 6:30pm for golden hour.

places.name: Helix Bridge walk
places.description: DNA-helix structure lit at dusk. Short scenic walk across to MBS.

places.name: CÉ LA VI SkyBar
places.description: Open-air rooftop bar at Marina Bay Sands Tower 3, Level 57. SGD 35 cover fully redeemable on drinks and food. Real mocktail menu. Spectra light show visible from 57 floors up at 9pm.
places.pregnancyNotes: Full mocktail menu — ask the bartender. No raw seafood in bar bites.
tips: Strict dress code: covered shoes, sleeved shirt, long pants.
Arrive by 7:30 to secure a window seat.

reservation.notes: SGD 35pp cover fully redeemable against food and drinks. Mon 18 May 7:30pm.

places.name: Toast Box, Bugis Junction
places.description: Reliable kaya toast chain at 200 Victoria St, Bugis Junction. Toast set, kopi, peanut butter toast. 8 min walk from hotel.
places.pregnancyNotes: Ask for HARD-BOILED eggs — skip the runny half-boiled default.

places.name: Sultan Mosque & Arab Street
places.description: Mosque interior open to non-Muslims 10am–12pm and 2–4pm. Malay Heritage Centre courtyard next door. Arab Street fabric shops, Haji Lane murals and indie boutiques.

places.name: Zam Zam
places.description: Open since 1908. Legendary chicken or mutton murtabak — stuffed flatbread, griddled to order. Biryani also excellent. 697-699 North Bridge Rd.
places.pregnancyNotes: Murtabak and biryani fully cooked — both safe.

places.name: Flower Dome (Gardens by the Bay)
places.description: Current seasonal floral display. AC, gentle walking, ~45 min. First stop in the Gardens bundle. MRT Downtown Line: Bencoolen → Bayfront, then 5 min walk through the underpass.
places.pregnancyNotes: AC throughout, benches available — comfortable.

reservation.notes: Already purchased — bring your QR codes. Tickets cover Flower Dome, Cloud Forest, and Botero exhibition. Scan separately at each venue.

places.name: Cloud Forest
places.description: Cool, misty AC. 35m indoor waterfall, Jurassic World animatronic dinosaurs. Spiral walkways with lifts available.
places.pregnancyNotes: Take the lifts on spirals. Cool climate is welcome.
tips: Covered by the bundle QR code — scan at entrance.

places.name: Botero: Heart of Volume
places.description: Largest Botero exhibition in the world — ~130 original paintings, drawings, and sculptures by Fernando Botero. At IMBA Theatre, West Lawn beside Bayfront Plaza. Last admission Mon–Thu is 6pm.
places.pregnancyNotes: AC throughout, benches available — very comfortable gallery pace.
tips: Covered by the bundle QR code. Natural last stop before walking east to Satay by the Bay.

places.name: Satay by the Bay
places.description: Hawker centre inside the Gardens. Chicken satay (well-grilled), Hainanese chicken rice, sugar cane juice. 15–20 min golden-hour walk east through the gardens from Botero.
places.pregnancyNotes: Stick to grilled and cooked stalls. Satay fully cooked.

places.name: Garden Rhapsody
places.description: Supertrees synchronised to music — 10 minutes of magic. Sit on the grass at OCBC Garden Plaza. Free, nightly.

places.name: Clap Cafe
places.description: Cosy café tucked in Waterloo Centre, 2 min walk from hotel. Strong coffee, pumpkin latte, basque cheesecake, banana bread.
places.pregnancyNotes: Skip latte if at caffeine limit — iced chocolate available.

places.name: Tekka Centre + Little India
places.description: 665 Buffalo Rd. Wet market downstairs, Sri Veeramakaliamman temple and Tan Teng Niah rainbow shophouse nearby for the photo. Upstairs food court: thosai, biryani, roti prata with chicken curry, mango lassi.
places.pregnancyNotes: SKIP rojak (raw veg). Biryani, prata, and curries fully cooked.

places.name: Mustafa Centre
places.description: 24/7 mega-store at 145 Syed Alwi Rd, 4 floors of affordable everything. Gifts (kaya jam, bak kwa, kopi packets), electronics, snacks. Tourist gift mecca.
places.pregnancyNotes: Lower floors can be crowded and stuffy — take breaks on upper floors.
tips: Best for spices, snacks, and anything you forgot to pack.

places.name: Peranakan Museum
places.description: Optional 30–40 min visit at 39 Armenian St before dinner. Compact, recently renovated — primes you for True Blue. Adults SGD 18.
places.pregnancyNotes: AC throughout, benches available.
tips: Skip if tired — True Blue is in a heritage shophouse that gives you the Peranakan context anyway.

places.name: True Blue Cuisine
places.description: Michelin Bib Gourmand Peranakan at 47/49 Armenian St. Order Ayam Buah Keluak, Beef Rendang, Itek Sio, Ngoh Hiang. ~SGD 50-60pp.
places.pregnancyNotes: All dishes fully cooked slow-braises. No raw fish on menu.

reservation.notes: Book on Chope or call +65 6440 0449. Aim for 7pm Wed 20 May.

places.name: Oh Wunder Cafe
places.description: Sit-down brunch at 231 Bain St, #01-69 Bras Basah Complex. Mentaiko salmon spaghetti, steak & eggs, lemon tart. Wunderfolks pastries.
places.pregnancyNotes: Order steak medium-well; no runny eggs.

places.name: Sri Mariamman & Buddha Tooth Relic Temples
places.description: Two of Chinatown's most striking temples. Sri Mariamman on South Bridge Rd, Buddha Tooth just around the corner with a peaceful rooftop garden. Cover shoulders and knees.
places.pregnancyNotes: Gentle walking pace, fine.
tips: Shoes off at both entrances.

places.name: Maxwell Food Centre
places.description: 1 Kadayanallur St. Ah Tai Hainanese Chicken Rice (#01-07) — ex-Tian Tian chef, shorter queue, fully cooked. Marina South fried carrot cake (cooked egg). Lao Ban soya beancurd dessert.
places.pregnancyNotes: Chicken rice and carrot cake fully cooked. Skip oyster omelette stalls.

places.name: Telok Ayer & Ann Siang Hill
places.description: Thian Hock Keng temple on Telok Ayer St, then up Ann Siang Rd through restored shophouses and café-lined streets. Stop for an iced drink. Some hills — use building lifts if tired.
places.pregnancyNotes: Some inclines — building lifts available.

places.name: Singapore River bumboat cruise
places.description: 40-min seated cruise from Clarke Quay jetty. Passes Cavenagh Bridge, Fullerton, the Merlion, MBS. Sunset over the river. Audio narration.
places.pregnancyNotes: Seated, gentle, comfortable.

reservation.notes: Book on Klook for the 6:30pm slot.

places.name: Jumbo Seafood, The Riverwalk
places.description: Use the Riverwalk branch at 20 Upper Circular Rd #B1-48 (not Riverside Point). Singapore chilli crab + black pepper crab, fully cooked. Mantou buns to mop up sauce. Bamboo clam and salted egg prawns excellent.
places.pregnancyNotes: SKIP cockle and clam sides. Crab fully cooked. Skip sashimi if on the menu.

reservation.notes: Recommended — book direct or via Chope.

places.name: Chin Mee Chin Confectionery
places.description: Legendary Katong kaya toast at 204 East Coast Rd. Charcoal-toasted bread, generous kaya. Many say better than Ya Kun.
places.pregnancyNotes: Ask for HARD-BOILED eggs. Kaya is safe (cooked egg + coconut + sugar).

places.name: Koon Seng Road shophouses
places.description: Pastel Peranakan shophouses — the photo stop. East Coast Rd murals, Rumah Bebe for beaded slippers and batik.
places.pregnancyNotes: Flat walk, fine.
tips: Best light before 11am.

places.name: 328 Katong Laksa
places.description: Use the 216 East Coast Rd branch (Google 4.2) — same recipe, better-rated than the original at #51. Noodles cut short — eat with a spoon. Add an otah on the side.
places.pregnancyNotes: ORDER "no cockles" — broth, prawns, and fishcake are fully cooked and safe.

places.name: Changi Airport — store luggage
places.description: Left-luggage at T1 or T3, ~SGD 14/bag for 24h. Then head to Jewel.
tips: Grab fallback ~SGD 30 if exhausted with bags.
Jewel is directly connected to T1, T2, T3 by walkway or Skytrain.

places.name: Jewel — Rain Vortex & Forest Valley
places.description: World's tallest indoor waterfall (40m). Walk under the Rain Vortex for free. Shiseido Forest Valley indoor terraced garden. Lifts and benches throughout.
places.pregnancyNotes: Lifts and benches throughout — comfortable.

places.name: Jewel Canopy Park
places.description: Level 5 of Jewel. Mirror Maze + Hedge Maze + Topiary Walk. All gentle and fun.
places.pregnancyNotes: Stick to Mirror Maze, Hedge Maze, Topiary Walk. NO Sky Nets, NO Walking Net.

reservation.notes: Book on Klook. Skip the Sky Nets (unsafe when pregnant).

places.name: Jewel B2 dinner
places.description: Last Singapore meal. Tim Ho Wan dim sum [4.2], Five Star Hainanese Chicken Rice [4.0], or Burger & Lobster [4.3].
places.pregnancyNotes: Dim sum fully cooked. Skip raw shrimp dumplings if any.

places.name: Rain Vortex light show
places.description: 9pm nightly — the waterfall lights up with synchronised music. Your final Singapore moment before the terminal.

places.name: Changi Airport (departure)
places.description: Near-midnight flight home. Pick up bags from left-luggage, transit to your departure terminal via Skytrain. Changi immigration is famously fast — 5 min even at peak.
tips: Be at the gate 2 hours before your flight.
Skytrain connects all terminals — no Grab needed once at the airport.
